privileged_info_summary: The task requires extracting DICOM tags (Patient ID, Study Instance UID, Series Instance UID) to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/routing_info.txt and saving a screenshot to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/dicom_info_screen.png. The underlying DICOM data is an anonymized sample from rubomedical.com. Depending on filesystem order, the target image will either be a CT scan (PatientID: 556342B) or an MR scan (PatientID: 322-292-73-6).
